features.name: FileMaker Platform Removal Requirements
features.description: Document requirements for removing FileMaker bridge infrastructure and transitioning to Supabase-first architecture, including environment routing analysis, backend API surface definition, and migration planning

features.name: Customers Migration Requirements
features.description: Document requirements for migrating Customers feature from FileMaker to Supabase, including data model mapping, API contracts, authorization, and migration strategy

features.name: Projects Migration Requirements
features.description: Document requirements for migrating Projects feature from FileMaker to Supabase, including all related entities (objectives, steps, images, links, notes), business logic (fixed price/subscription), and comprehensive API contracts

features.name: Tasks Migration Requirements
features.description: Document requirements for migrating Tasks and Timer features from FileMaker to Supabase, including task CRUD, timer start/stop/pause semantics, financial record generation, dual-write reconciliation, and historical data migration strategy

features.name: Teams Supabase Migration
features.description: Migrate Teams feature from FileMaker to Supabase-backed architecture with full backend API support, including teams, staff, team membership relationships, and project assignments

features.name: Notes Migration Requirements
features.description: Create comprehensive requirements documentation for migrating Notes feature from FileMaker to Supabase, including polymorphic associations (projects/tasks/customers), data model design, API contracts, authorization, and migration planning

features.name: QuickBooks Migration Requirements
features.description: Document requirements for migrating QuickBooks integration from FileMaker script execution to backend/Supabase, including OAuth flow, token management, organization scoping, invoice generation, and error handling

features.name: Tasks Backend Integration
features.description: Integrate tasks and timer features with new Supabase-backed backend APIs (12 endpoints), replacing FileMaker implementation with proper data mapping, timer semantics, financial record generation, and comprehensive testing

features.name: Customers Backend API Integration
features.description: Integrate frontend customer management with new backend API endpoints at /api/customers/*, supporting relational data model with nested emails/phones/addresses while maintaining FileMaker backward compatibility

features.name: Projects Backend Integration
features.description: Migrate Projects feature from FileMaker to new backend API endpoints with full CRUD operations for projects, objectives, steps, images, links, and notes

features.name: Notes Backend Integration
features.description: Migrate notes functionality from FileMaker to backend Supabase API, updating API layer, service transformations, and hooks to use /api/notes endpoints with HMAC authentication, pagination, and full CRUD support

features.name: Links Backend Integration
features.description: Integrate frontend with new backend /links API endpoints, replacing FileMaker calls with full CRUD operations for links associated with projects, tasks, customers, and organizations

features.name: Financial Records Backend Integration
features.description: Integrate financial records frontend with new backend Supabase RPC APIs, replacing FileMaker calls with get_financial_records, create_financial_record, mark_records_billed RPCs and updating all related services and components

features.name: QuickBooks Backend Integration
features.description: Integrate frontend with new backend QuickBooks API infrastructure for connection management, synchronization, and invoice operations, replacing FileMaker script calls with direct backend integration

features.name: FileMaker Frontend Removal
features.description: Remove all FileMaker dependencies from frontend codebase, including fm-gofer bridge, dual-environment routing, FileMaker authentication, and environment detection, transitioning to pure Supabase + Backend API architecture
